scripts.dev: bash -lc 'PORT=$(node ./scripts/find-renderer-port.js 3001 3002 3003 3004 3005) && echo "Using renderer port: $PORT" && concurrently "RENDERER_PORT=$PORT npm run dev:electron" "RENDERER_PORT=$PORT npm run dev:renderer"'
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:agent: node -e "const c=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cwd=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../agent');fs.rmSync(path.join(cwd,'build'),{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync(path.join(cwd,'dist'),{recursive:true,force:true});if(process.platform==='win32'){const py=path.join(cwd,'venv','Scripts','python.exe');if(!fs.existsSync(py)){console.error('ERROR: venv\\Scripts\\python.exe not found. Create the agent venv first.');process.exit(1);}const r=c.spawnSync(py,['-m','PyInstaller','--clean','--noconfirm','havenai-agent.spec'],{cwd,stdio:'inherit'});if(r.error) throw r.error;process.exit(r.status||0);}const r=c.spawnSync('bash',['build_binary.sh'],{cwd,stdio:'inherit'});if(r.error) throw r.error;process.exit(r.status||0);"
scripts.package: npm run build:agent && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:agent && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: npm run build:agent && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:agent && npm run build && electron-builder --linux
